message:
✨ ClusterMetrics: Show live data without Prometheus dependency

- Track real cluster metrics (CPU, memory, pods, nodes) over time
- Persist history to localStorage with 30-minute TTL
- Show time-series chart after collecting 2+ data points
- Add RefreshButton with failure tracking
- Remove demo data generation - use actual cluster data
- Filter by time range (15m, 1h, 6h, 24h)
- Show "Live" badge when real data is available

Part of Phase 2: Filtering & State (Item 10 - Time-series persist)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
